QW-310  QUALIFICATION RANGE FOR PERFORMANCE QUALIFICATION. (a) A welder qualified on a test coupon of a given thickness is qualified to weld within the thickness range as described in this paragraph. (b) A welder qualified on pipe of a given diameter is qualified for the diameter range specified herein. (c) Qualification in the overhead position qualifies for all positions, except as limited by QW-350. Thickness limits for procedure qualification are subject to QW-451 and are independent of performance ranges. See QW-300 for general requirements. Refer to QW-301 for test requirements. Base metals shall be grouped in accordance with QW-403.
